quote: Her ability to combine professional knowledge with empathy and sincere dedication to the well-being of others has been greatly appreciated by both patients and colleagues.
longQuote: Her ability to combine professional knowledge with empathy and sincere dedication to the well-being of others has been greatly appreciated by both patients and colleagues. I can recommend her without hesitation as a skilled, responsible, and dedicated physiotherapist.
name: Anna Orzechowska
role: President of the Board · Foundation and Rehabilitation Centre “Znowu w Biegu”
